reference: Hello Doctor, I had jock itch one year ago and it got cured; however, the skin started turning black and rough and it is spreading slowly. I used Onabet cream but it did not cure the issue. My scrotum and upper thighs are rough, sore, and dark. Please advise me on how to get cured.
text: I don't know how to do this. If you just tell me what to do, I'll do it.
